I need someone to go to ~mission(Location|Address) and retrieve the shipment of ~mission(Item). ~mission(Timed)The job will be bonded through ~mission(Contractor), so you don't have worry about being stiffed. Just bring it to ~mission(Destination) and you'll get paid. Simple. ~mission(Danger)
